title: Multi Block Reference And Negative
description: Two relevant blocks and one distractor block exercise mixed positive and negative replay material.
prompt: Use the CLI and report schema notes to describe the generated run layout. Do not use the unrelated pricing note.

workspace_files.content: The run-agent-scenarios CLI writes raw provider JSON, normalized replay JSON, and a report.json file under benchmark/runs/<timestamp> for each scripted scenario.
The report schema counts sessions, assistant turns, prompt blocks, tool calls, and referenced candidate blocks detected from normalized replay records.
This unrelated note discusses a future cache-cost benchmark and should not be treated as evidence for the trace generator output layout.
